description: At the heart of Dry Bones are three accomplished musicians: J.D. Edwards, Nathan Rogers, and Leonard Podolak, each a force in their own right. Together they are a powerhouse trio that seamlessly blends contemporary songwriting with deep traditional roots. Their music is both fresh and timeless—new wine in an old bottle, where echoes of the past weave through every note. One moment, they channel the raw energy of a jug band; the next, they ignite with the driving force of acoustic rock and roll. Their performances are dynamic, their songwriting exceptional, and their instrumental interplay nothing short of brilliant.
title: Dry Bones Concert
